business_ideas.idea: Various companies mentioned in awards - winners of 2022 contest categories

dynamics: Playful awards show format—third annual Milly Awards episode celebrating best podcast moments, guests, and discoveries of 2022. Sam and Shaan riff through categories: Billy of the Year, Breakout Company, Unsexy Business, Best Investments, Worst Investments. High energy, comedic.
learnings: Annual retrospective shows evolution of MFM thesis and guest quality over time
Awards categories reflect show values: unsexy/boring businesses, billionaires, creators, investable ideas
End-of-year format allows fans to catch up on best moments and guest insights

banger_quotes.quote: You went from dirty Indian to alpha Persian with one jacket

notable: Annual awards episode format—third iteration, establishing tradition. Celebration of year's themes and guest appearances; shows show's growth and audience engagement through voting/participation
